## Summary
- Describe the change in a few bullets.

## Related issue
- Closes #

## Type of change
- [ ] `feat`
- [ ] `fix`
- [ ] `docs`
- [ ] `refactor`
- [ ] `test`
- [ ] `chore`

## Verification
- [ ] `bun run lint`
- [ ] `bun run test`
- [ ] `bun run build`
- [ ] Manual QA completed when relevant

## Notes
- Mention follow-ups, tradeoffs, or anything reviewers should focus on.
